name: Avocado & Grapefruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the avocado into 8 wedges.
2. Arrange equal amounts of avocado and grapefruit on four salad dishes.
3. Top each salad with 2 slices of onion.
4. Dress each salad with 1 tablespoon of poppy seed sauce.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 Fruit Exchange + 1 Fat Exchange; Calories: 137, Cholesterol: 0mg; Carbohydrates: 3g; Protein: 17mg; Potassium: 109; Fat: 10g.
